testcase.name: (1) 表单渲染: AiVideo.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > AiVideo page imports and uses ToolForm with toolKey ai-video
(1) 表单渲染: AiVideo.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > ToolForm has ai-video case with sourceCopy textarea
(1) 表单渲染: AiVideo.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > ToolForm ai-video case has scenesCount select (5-8) and imageStyle select
(1) 表单渲染: AiVideo.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > AiVideo page uses aiVideoFrontendInput schema and submitLabel 生成 AI 视频
(1) 表单渲染: AiVideo.tsx + ToolForm.tsx > ToolResult has ai-video case importing AiVideoResult
(2) zod 校验失败显示中文 message > sourceCopy 留空 → sourceCopy 至少 10 个字符
(2) zod 校验失败显示中文 message > scenesCount 字符串 "5" 被 preprocess coerce 为 number 5
(2) zod 校验失败显示中文 message > valid input passes
(2) zod 校验失败显示中文 message > imageStyle default is natural when omitted
(3) submit → AiVideoResult 渲染 > AiVideo page calls trpc.aiVideo.generateStoryboard.useMutation
(3) submit → AiVideoResult 渲染 > AiVideo page renders AiVideoResult when activeHistory is set
(3) submit → AiVideoResult 渲染 > handleSuccess writes historyId to LS with account namespace (SHIELD REJ-010)
(4) polling tick mock — refetchInterval:3000 > AiVideoResult uses trpc.aiVideo.jobStatus.useQuery with refetchInterval:3000
(4) polling tick mock — refetchInterval:3000 > polling is disabled when allCompleted (refetchInterval:false)
(5) scene 完成 → sceneImageUrl → 渲染 > AiVideoResult renders when scene is completed with sceneImageUrl
(5) scene 完成 → sceneImageUrl → 渲染 > AiVideoResult shows skeleton+spinner for pending scenes
(6) 全完成 banner > AiVideoResult shows completion banner when allCompleted
(6) 全完成 banner > completion triggered when completed === total && total > 0
(7) 失败 scene 重试 button > AiVideoResult renders retry button for failed scenes
(7) 失败 scene 重试 button > retry button onClick shows toast PRD-7+ placeholder
LS namespace key format > getToolLsKey generates correct ai-video polling key
